resource_candidates.selection_rationale: Provides public movement history needed for route anomaly checks.
Supports beneficial-ownership link analysis for shell entities.
Useful for low-signal indicators around transshipment hubs.

collection_plan.phase_1: Acquire vessel and ownership baseline dataset.
collection_plan.phase_2: Correlate ownership entities with sanctions and procurement records.
collection_plan.phase_3: Generate confidence-scored alert list for commander briefing.
